mapper.select: SELECT id, name, logo, url, number, channel_id, enabled, provider_id, group_id, epg_source_id, sort_order, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM channels WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, name, logo, url, number, channel_id, enabled, provider_id, group_id, epg_source_id, sort_order, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM channels WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.logo, c.url, c.number, c.channel_id, c.enabled, c.provider_id, c.group_id, c.epg_source_id, c.sort_order, c.description, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.deleted FROM channels c INNER JOIN channel_groups g ON c.group_id = g.id WHERE g.name = #{group} AND c.deleted = 0 AND g.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.id ASC

SELECT id, name, logo, url, number, channel_id, enabled, provider_id, group_id, epg_source_id, sort_order, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM channels WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO channels (name, logo, url, number, channel_id, enabled, provider_id, group_id, epg_source_id, sort_order, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{logo}, #{url}, #{number}, #{channelId}, #{enabled}, #{providerId}, #{groupId}, #{epgSourceId}, #{sortOrder}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, 0)

INSERT INTO channels (name, logo, url, number, channel_id, enabled, provider_id, group_id, epg_source_id, sort_order, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.name}, #{item.logo}, #{item.url}, #{item.number}, #{item.channelId}, #{item.enabled}, #{item.providerId}, #{item.groupId}, #{item.epgSourceId}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.description}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE channels SET name = #{name}, logo = #{logo}, url = #{url}, number = #{number}, channel_id = #{channelId}, enabled = #{enabled}, provider_id = #{providerId}, group_id = #{groupId}, epg_source_id = #{epgSourceId}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
